title: Department Manager Vacancy at Costa Coffee India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Costa Coffee India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Costa Coffee India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Department Manager to join our dynamic team in Surat. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Costa Coffee India:
Costa Coffee India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Costa Coffee India!
